name: Log Cabin Toast
recipeIngredient: 2 slice White or whole wheat bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl.
2. Toast slices of bread until lightly browned. Spread with soft butter, spreading it evenly over the surface.
3. Sprinkle each toast slice with the sugar-cinnamon mixture.
4. Cut each slice of toast into 4 strips. Arrange them on a plate to resemble stacked logs forming the walls of a log cabin, starting from the top and eating all the slices.
